title: Vance Says Iran Will Allow Nuclear Watchdog to Restart Inspections
summary_full: Vice President JD Vance said Iran had agreed to invite experts from the U.N. agency to resume operations in the country. Tehran and the nuclear watchdog have not commented.
summary_public: Vice President JD Vance said Iran had agreed to invite experts from the U.N. agency to resume operations in the country. Tehran and the nuclear watchdog have not commented.

IR.label: positive
IR.evidence: Iran Will Allow Nuclear Watchdog to Restart Inspections
